items.description: Crash on US 219 southbound between 2 miles NORTH of Exit: US 30 - JENNERSTOWN/STOYSTOWN and 1 miles NORTH of Exit: US 30 - JENNERSTOWN/STOYSTOWN. There is a lane restriction.
